summary: Automation alert when AAP is not installed is incorrect

steps_to_reproduce.action: Navigate to ACM perspective (if available) or find Clusters menu
Observe the alert message when AAP is not installed

expected_result: Alert should display correct information about Ansible workflow deprecation
evidence_to_capture: Full page screenshot showing navigation path
Browser console logs if any errors present

bug_confirmed_if: Alert content references deprecated Ansible workflow support
Message does not reflect current ACM capabilities
